title: EPIL Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Graduate Apprentice Posts
description: The Engineering Projects India Limited (EPIL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Graduate Apprentice Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech in Mechanical, Electrical, and Civil Engineering can apply for the EPIL Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education det...
